falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 closes below 4200 at any point in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A break below the August 2024 lows would invalidate the 78% pattern match to bottom_2024_aug, as that bottom held at ~4400 and this would represent a significantly lower structural low, proving the analog has broken down

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 35 for 2 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The August 2024 bottom saw VIX peak near 28; sustained VIX above 35 would indicate panic conditions worse than the reference pattern, falsifying the 'bottom' signal and suggesting a more severe liquidation phase than the matched template

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y Treasury yield drops below 3.50% at any point
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The August 2024 bottom occurred with yields ~3.85-4.00%; a sub-3.50% yield would signal a flight-to-safety panic or recession repricing inconsistent with the 'bottom' pattern, which featured stabilization not deflationary collapse

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
